course_expected_weights._note: Shinnecock Hills: Par-70, ~7445y, links-style major. USGA setup — firm, fast, penal rough. PUTT moderate (poa annua/fescue mix, variable speeds under wind). OTT neutral — accuracy trumps distance on narrow corridors. Knowledge-based estimate: no Shinnecock entry in COURSE_DNA_LIBRARY.
